title: WINTER WEATHER ADVISORIES - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION WINTER WEATHER ADVISORIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers information on winter weather including avoiding frostbite, hypothermia, food safety, preventing carbon monoxide poisoning, and cold weather health and safety tips. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (971) 673-1222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 673-1222 Main phone (971) 673-1299 FAX 711 TTY/TTD (800) 422-6012 Toll-free Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Somali, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Disaster Preparedness Information Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES -
